## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI/cloud resource access needs and explore potential partnerships/solutions with Madrona's support.](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's AI-driven platform requires heavy compute resources, hitting API limits (esp. Anthropic)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Madrona can help escalate access/limit issues with key providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX prefers direct API access for latest models; cloud provider solutions less ideal](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Potential for significant cloud credits ($600k+) through strategic provider engagement](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI-powered workflow engine for complex knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Executes intricate plans using various APIs, services, and AI models](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Compute-heavy processes (e.g., 832k activities this month)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [High-quality output prioritized over cost-efficiency (e.g., $25k-30k/mo contracts)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Current Resource Challenges

  - [Hitting rate limits with Anthropic API (highest priority)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [OpenAI unresponsive to public form submissions](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Heavy users of Perplexity API (not yet rate-limited)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [SEMrush as current top cost driver among "other" APIs](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Cloud Provider Considerations

  - [Using Render for most infrastructure; some LangChain (considering alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Reluctant to use cloud provider AI services (e.g., AWS Bedrock) due to delayed model access](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Need immediate access to latest models for competitive edge](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Partnership Opportunities

  - [Anthropic: Katie to escalate via VCBD team (Danny Delaney)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [OpenAI: Katie to help establish connection for limit increases](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Perplexity: Potential for $5k in API credits via Madrona's startup ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [SEMrush: Potential for co-marketing, non-competitive partnership](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Cloud providers: Strategic engagement for maximum credits ($600k+ potential)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Additional Resource Needs

  - [Datadog for observability (credits/partnership inquiry)](https://fathom.video/share/mBLWXXXFUyLiMQZzMqJ67RkQqZ91fycQ?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
